title: The Taming of Dorothy
writer: Peppino De Filippo, W.F. Templeton, Noel Langley
actors: Jean Kent, Robert Beatty, Gordon Harker
plot: While casing a bank he intends to rob, tough gangster Leo L'Americano (Robert Beatty) discovers that Antonio Pellegrini (Robert Beatty), a meek and mild clerk in the bank, is his exact double. Leo kidnaps Antonio and robs the bank...
